nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS number_of_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS number_of_faculty_members, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS number_of_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS number_of_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS average_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c      ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit         course ON course.id     = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache         fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board                b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment     sa ON sa.script_id = a.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt    ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_marks     em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  au.unit_type   = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY number_of_courses DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (evaluation_attempt, faculty_cache, board, evaluation_marks, script_assignment, academic_unit). You must qualify it with a table alias.
